home.notes: Rebuilt as WXML/WXSS code: header, single hero/upload card, upload button, quick actions, recent report list, and custom bottom tabs.

analysis.notes: Rebuilt as WXML/WXSS code: centered brand header, large white progress card, drawn progress ring, four status rows, later-view button, and refresh action.

failure.notes: Rebuilt as WXML/WXSS code: header, white failure card, drawn document/mascot/error illustration, retry, reupload, and back-home controls.

behaviorPreserved: Upload / choose-file / create-order flow remains in existing page JS and passed home-upload tests.
Analysis progress refresh and later-view navigation remain in existing page JS and passed analysis-failure tests.
Failure retry, reupload, and back-home actions remain in existing page JS and passed analysis-failure plus owner E2E tests.

verification.evidence: PowerShell blocked npm.ps1; npm.cmd was used instead. The project test runner also treats multiple selectors as an AND filter, so no group matched both selectors.
2 owner E2E tests passed; the script accepted the scenario argument while running the owner suite.

verification.command: npm.cmd run visual:scoremap -- home analysis failure
verification.evidence: T14 visual harness wrote 3 screen comparisons; pixelmatch/live simulator raster comparison is unavailable in this local harness.
No whitespace errors reported; Git emitted line-ending normalization warnings only.

visualEvidence.limitation: The local harness provides deterministic structural artifacts and reference copies; it does not claim pixel-perfect PASS without live WeChat simulator raster capture.

remoteAssets.notes: No remote images, fonts, or CDN dependencies were added; illustrations are drawn in WXML/WXSS.
